title: B Team
description: The B Team modpack; 220+ mods dedicated to an expanded vanilla atmosphere. Exploration, creation, and performance addons specifically catered to the appeal of my friends and I.
body:
Modpack I made specifically for my friends and I. It's catered to performance boosts, expanded exploration, and a deeper dive into creativity. New machines, blocks, biomes, weapons, classes, etc., are all the name of the game. Its supposed to emulate a Vanilla+ feel by adding more details to what already exists in the game. The only mod in the pack that I didn't pull directly from modrinth was Cave Dweller. I got that file from Curse Forge. This is the link to that mod:

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-reimagined-fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-reimagined-fabric)

Other than that, all mods, shaders, and resource packs are pulled directly from Modrinth. I don't claim rights to any of the work. I owe a huge thanks to the modding community for allowing me to experience their creations. An even bigger thanks goes to Modrinth, for allowing me to compile it into a pack that specifically caters to my friends and I. Thank you!!!
